prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约1589→1521→882，近两年位次持续大幅前移，2025年较2024年前移639名，竞争明显加剧；2025年基准位次约882名；本省理科计划2023–2025年均为14人；2026年计划13人，较2025年缩招1人（-7.14%），计划减少使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名（校本部）2026年第12位，近年排名持续上升，学校层次与品牌影响力进一步增强；2026年声誉评价中性偏稳，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排 名第10位（高热），社会关注度较高；2024年曾出现投档线异常信号，但2025年位次大幅前移已消化该影响；共享哈工大17个A类学科，其中力学、机械工程、 材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程为A+，计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程为A，工科实力顶尖，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工 程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续高热，与该校工科试验班招生方向高度契合；新疆2026年高考总人数约23.8万人，较2025年大幅增长，按历史比例估算理科考生约16.3万人 ，考生规模显著扩大，竞争压力上升；该校位于山东威海，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；新疆考生赴东部沿海就读意愿 较强，地域偏好对报考热度有一定正向作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势走势、2026年招生计划小幅缩招、考生规模显著扩大以及学校排名持续上升等因素 ，预计2026年竞争较2025年进一步加剧，位次继续前移；预测最低位次约804名，区间712–896名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（未来信息）（计算机科学与技术、人工智能等）
- 工科试验班（未来智造拔尖班）（机器人工程、智能制造工程等）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（未来智造卓越优才计划）（机器人工程、机械设计制造及其自动化等）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 暂无
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间712–896名内，建议以二档工科试验班（未来智造卓越优才计划）为主力填报，一档未来信息/未来智造拔尖班可冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（712名以内）可重 点冲击一档王牌专业。该校在新疆仅设工科试验班大类招生，专业分流政策需关注学校官网。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science was approximately 1589 → 1521 → 882. In the past two years, the ranking has continued to move forward significantly. In 2025, it moved forward by 639 places compared to 2024, indicating intensified competition. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 882. The provincial Science enrollment plan was 14 from 2023 to 2025. In 2026, the plan is 13, a reduction of 1 (-7.14%) compared to 2025, slightly increasing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking (main campus), it ranks 12th, with a continuous rise in recent years, further enhancing its level and brand influence. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral to stable, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 10th overall (high heat), indicating high social attention. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission threshold, but the significant forward movement in 2025 has absorbed this impact. It shares 17 A-level disciplines with HIT, including Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering as A+, and Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering as A, with top-tier engineering strength, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular, aligning well with the university's engineering experimental class enrollment direction. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Xinjiang is about 238,000, a significant increase from 2025. Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 163,000 Science candidates, with a notable expansion in candidate scale, increasing competitive pressure. The university is located in Weihai, Shandong, not a local university, so there is no local enrollment preference. Xinjiang candidates have a strong willingness to study in eastern coastal areas, and regional preference has a certain positive effect on application heat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of significant forward movement in 2025 rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the notable expansion in candidate scale, and the continuous rise in university ranking, it is expected that competition in 2026 will further intensify compared to 2025, with rankings continuing to move forward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 804, with a range of 712–896.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Intelligent Manufacturing Top Class) (Robotics Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Intelligent Manufacturing Excellence Talent Program) (Robotics Engineering, Mechanical Design and Automation, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- None currently
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 712–896, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class (Future Intelligent Manufacturing Excellence Talent Program) as the main choice, and you can aim for Tier 1 Future Information/Future Intelligent Manufacturing Top Class as a stretch. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 712), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 top majors. This university only offers Engineering Experimental Class enrollment in Xinjiang, so pay attention to the university's official website for major allocation policies.
